label: Transparent Tulip motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Tulip transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated tulip cup motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single red-coral tulip cup with a visible deep black center, subtle petal veins, crisp petal edges, a small leaf-green stem and two leaf-green leaves, natural spring-field botanical texture, accurate tulip form, bold gallery-system presence.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the whole tulip cup, black center, short stem, and leaves without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves coral-red petal gradients, black center depth, green leaf structure, and natural flower surface detail.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no vase, no bouquet, no landscape, no decorative background, no second flower, no insects, no fruit.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Tulip light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board derived from the visible tulip cup motif in this conversation, for a ready Morphous catalog system named "Morphous Tulip".
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the tulip: red coral tulip cup, deep black flower center, leaf green stem and leaves, warm spring-field neutrals, crisp botanical veins, bold gallery-system contrast.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 source-art composition.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board. Use large readable labels and fewer, larger rows; avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Tulip", motif story, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, generated asset examples.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-like buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette/search, sidebar/nav, dashboard chart, metric cards, empty state, error state, loading state, focus rings.
Typography: include English product UI guidance and Japanese examples, with clear labels such as "Type", "Japanese", "見出し", "本文".
Style/medium: premium product design-system board, precise 8px grid, 8px radii, bold gallery layout, coral action bars, black-center focus rings, leaf-green support chips, petal-vein dividers, spring-field paper surfaces, restrained botanical texture.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors: red coral tulip cup, leaf green, black center, ivory petal highlight, pollen blush, warm spring-field paper, sage neutral, clay shadow, gallery ink.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon, no vase, no bouquet, no insects, no fruit, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Tulip dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Tulip" that feels like the same system as the visible light board and tulip motif translated to dark mode.
Reference use: Preserve the tulip-derived palette roles, component language, texture, spacing, and typography from the visible light board: red coral tulip cup for primary actions, deep black center for background and focus depth, leaf green for support/status, ivory petal highlights for foreground, warm spring-field neutrals for panels, subtle petal-vein texture, bold gallery-system accents.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 source-art composition.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board. Use large readable labels and fewer, larger rows; avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Tulip", "Dark Mode", palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, generated asset examples.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-like buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette/search, sidebar/nav, dashboard chart, metric cards, empty state, error state, loading state, focus rings.
Typography: include English product UI guidance and Japanese examples, with clear labels such as "Type", "Japanese", "見出し", "本文".
Visual details: dark gallery-ink background from the tulip black center, soft charcoal cards, coral active states, petal-ivory text, leaf-green success/support, pollen-blush warning accents, black-center rings and separators, subtle botanical vein texture overlays, precise 8px grid and 8px radii.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors: red coral tulip cup, leaf green, black center, ivory petal highlight, pollen blush, warm spring-field paper adapted darker, sage neutral, clay shadow, gallery ink.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no flat pure black void, no vase, no bouquet, no insects, no fruit, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext.
